case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SFPD. VS. TERESA ELENA BOVEE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SFPD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VIRGINIA HO--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO COSTS CHARGED BY PROCESS SERVER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SFPD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOVEE, TERESA ELENA $1,369.88 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,369.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SFPD AS TO DEFENDANT BOVEE, TERESA ELENA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SFPD AS TO DEFENDANT BOVEE, TERESA ELENA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SEE SIGNATURE - SERVED AUG-15-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOVEE, TERESA ELENA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SFPD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2014 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-08-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
